mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods with UNRATE < 3.5 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the trigger condition fails to materialize.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) indicates strong demand-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth in HOUST and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60-day SPX returns in 60%+ of cases or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 109.2026 signals strengthening supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in INDPRO > 109.2026 periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the trigger condition fails to materialize.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in CPI inflation above 2.5% triggers central bank hawkishness, leading to higher discount rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in CPIAUCSL > 2.5 periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the trigger condition fails to materialize.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in payroll employment (PAYEMS) below 152,544 thousand signals weakening labor demand, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in PAYEMS decline periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the trigger condition fails to materialize.

mechanism_narrative: A negative correlation between GDP growth (GDPC1) and consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates stagflationary risks, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The negative correlation between GDPC1 and CPIAUCSL fails to predict SPX 20-day returns (Rank IC < 0.05) or the interaction effect collapses.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below 109.2026 signals supply-side disruption, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in INDPRO < 109.2026 periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the trigger condition fails to materialize.
